finding: all k1/k3 workload projections were previously B-like despite real workload direct RTL blocked
fix: downgraded readiness: exact direct-clean rows B, large projections C, observed blocked rows D

finding: group16_v7 workload details could be read without scope context
direct validation report said the real workload run was still running after it had been stopped
fix: renamed status to observed_blocked_x_and_zero_cycles and updated README wording

finding: softmax appeared as unsupported_operator rather than excluded from paper main table

attn_score was described mainly as a large res_rows=32 failure, but threshold scan shows cout=27/28 clean while cout=29/30/32 already has a zero-cycle run at res_rows=1; at cout=29, res_cols=1 is clean while res_cols>=2 is blocked, cin=1 is clean while cin>=2 is blocked, and group4/8 do not provide clean counterexamples
fix: added attn_score_threshold_review_v1 and cout>=29,cin>=2,res_cols>=2 high-cout multi-Cin boundary protection in simulator scope

risk: k1 spatial projection overestimates wider Cout rows
finding: trace_gemm_015 direct RTL was clean and showed cycles 2010, while the old per-spatial multiplier predicted 6000 because it repeated the first spatial block Cout-dependent startup cost across all spatial blocks
fix: replaced k1 workload formula with v8 spatial-reuse rule: total=first_spatial+(spatial_points-1)*repeat_spatial; added trace_gemm_015 as direct-clean holdout and trace_conv_018 as blocked-X evidence

risk: matching cycle count can still hide invalid RTL outputs
finding: trace_gemm_016 directly matched the v8 projected 6832 cycles with 128 done interrupts, but XPROBE2 reported cluster_x=192 router_read_x=159 router_write_x=192 output_read_x=2207
fix: kept cycle model unchanged, added trace_gemm_016 to D_direct_rtl_blocked, and strengthened the rule that cycle agreement alone is insufficient without XPROBE-clean output validity

risk: multi-Cin spatial boundary was too permissive
finding: a boundary probe at cout=2,cin=3,res_cols=2,res_rows=8 completed all 48 runs with the expected 2592 cycles but still reported cluster_x=32 router_read_x=15 router_write_x=32 output_read_x=2047
fix: added spatial_multicin_x_boundary_v1 and downgraded k1 rows with cin>=3 and spatial_points>=16 to D_observed_multicin_spatial_x_boundary unless directly cleaner evidence is added later
